name: Jerky
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut meat into 1 1/2 inch by 1/4 inch by 5 inch strips.
2. Soak meat in a mixture of soy sauce, 1 tablespoon brown sugar, and 1 tablespoon oil for 2 to 4 hours.
3. Pat dry the meat.
4. Mix seasonings well and place in a clean shaker.
5. Using a foil-covered cookie sheet, place meat (in one layer) and sprinkle the mix over it to taste.
6. Fold the foil edges up to keep the mixture in place.
7. Dry at 140 to 180 degrees for 5 to 8 hours.
8. Keep in an open container at room temperature. Do not refrigerate.
